title: ffi: client sends unencrypted ClearMessage (no MLS) — track as missing feature
description: ffi/src/api/client.rs: client_send_message and client_send_whisper send pad(ClearMessage::Chat{text}) directly without MLS encryption. Any Flutter app user who assumes E2E encryption is active is not protected. The nie-brief.md acknowledges this as a planned phase (Phase 5 per roadmap). The risk is that the FFI API surface already ships without encryption but callers may not know. Ensure API docs for NieClient clearly state MLS is not yet active, and track MLS integration for the Flutter client as a separate issue.
